title: Grave of the Forgotten
description:
There is a single grave with a [jitter][aqua]roiling blue flame[/aqua][/jitter]...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it [sine]begging[/sine] to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the [red]truth[/red]?

options.title: Confront with Truth
options.description: Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card that [gold]Exhausts[/gold] with [purple]Soul's Power[/purple].
options.requires: You have no cards with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that can be [purple]Enchanted[/purple].

notes:
**Confront option mechanics**: Adds [red]Decay[/red] to your deck and allows you to enchant one card that [gold]Exhausts[/gold] with [purple]Soul's Power[/purple]. The enchantment removes the [gold]Exhaust[/gold] keyword from the selected card. This option is locked if you have no cards in your deck that can be enchanted by [purple]Soul's Power[/purple] (i.e., no cards with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that haven't been enchanted).

**Forgotten Soul relic**: An event relic that deals [blue]1[/blue] damage to a random enemy each time you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. This effect triggers whenever any card exhausts, whether from active play or other sources.

**Decay curse**: An [gold]Unplayable[/gold] curse that deals [blue]2[/blue] damage at the end of each turn if it remains in your hand. The damage is affected by player powers and vulnerabilities.
